title: horsfieldia racemosa
intro: Horsfieldia racemosa, also known as the False Ashoka or False Pathan Phani, is a plant species belonging to the family Myristicaceae, native to the tropical forests of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Horsfieldia racemosa include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat various health conditions.
